snippet.title: FIREFLY REBOOT TRAILER 2028
snippet.description:
Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. New Episodes, Firefly Reboot Episode 1 Teaser, Nathan Fillion Mal Reynolds, Gina Torres, Alan Tudyk, Morena Baccarin, Jewel Staite, Adam Baldwin, Sean Maher & Summer Glau & what happened after The Serenity Movie 2005 ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VLAKfS3RlB0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=3&pp=iAQBsAgC
Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Episode 6 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tG779rR3sVM&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
The Boys Season 5 Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Duk6_UmW6AQ&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Henry Cavill Highlander Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MKhod_ziM0s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=2&pp=iAQB2AbwA7AIAg%3D%3D
Masters Of The Universe Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEPEM1BoBuo&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=11&pp=iAQB2AauBLAIAg%3D%3D
Avengers Doomsday X-Men Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hz5IpqEri2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0qPeNpdeIo0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=5&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering new Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. Nathan Fillion Malcolm "Mal" Reynolds, Gina Torres Zoe Alleyne Washburne, Alan Tudyk Hoban "Wash" Washburne, Morena Baccarin Inara Serra, Adam Baldwin Jayne Cobb, Jewel Staite Kaywinnet Lee "Kaylee" Frye, Sean Maher Simon Tam, Summer Glau River Tam and more returning cast from the original series.

Disney Plus Release, Firefly Reboot currently titled Firefly Still Flyin and Episode 1 Athenia Title Explained. What happened after the events of the Serenity Movie 2005. Firefly Comics Explained, the Firefly comics continued the story after the events of the Serenity Movie with Mal and Inara together, Zoe having Wash's Baby Emma, Kaylee and Simon together, River Tam pilot of the Serenity. The crew still on the run from the Alliance, and rogue psychics from the alliance like River Tam with the same powers and abilities. Revealing there were way more people they experimented on.

Several characters return including Chiwetel Ejiofor's The Operative, and we learn more about the backstory of Book's character. And other questions raised during the original Firefly series and later Serenity Movie that were never answered or explored in depth.

Alan Tudyk is returning as Wash, but they have not explained how he is alive again. If the series will take place before the Serenity Movie, or if they will include his character in the new series in some other way. But he will participate in the series.

Marc Guggenheim from Arrow, The Flash, Supergirl, Legends of Tomorrow and the other Arrowverse projects is showrunning with his IRL wife Tara Butters, who did Agent Carter, Joss Whedon's Dollhouse, The Boys Gen V and other shows. 

Joss Whedon is not currently returning, but Nathan Fillion has said he gave his blessing for them to continue Firefly. And they got the legal rights from Fox and Disney to make the series. And are currently figuring out season 1 with an estimated 2028-2029 release date.

I'll do more Firefly Reboot videos as we learn more about the series and get a trailer or teaser of some kind. Nathan Fillion and the rest of the cast will continue talking about it until then too.

Lots more DC and Marvel Trailers coming Supergirl Trailer 2026, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, and Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon too!

Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. New Episodes, Firefly Reboot Episode 1 Teaser, Nathan Fillion Mal Reynolds, Gina Torres, Alan Tudyk, Morena Baccarin, Jewel Staite, Adam Baldwin, Sean Maher & Summer Glau & what happened after The Serenity Movie 2005 ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe

Henry Cavill Highlander Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MKhod_ziM0s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=2&pp=iAQB2AbwA7AIAg%3D%3D
Masters Of The Universe Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEPEM1BoBuo&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=11&pp=iAQB2AauBLAIAg%3D%3D
Avengers Doomsday X-Men Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hz5IpqEri2s&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0qPeNpdeIo0&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=5&pp=gAQBiAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering new Firefly Reboot Trailer 2028. Nathan Fillion Malcolm "Mal" Reynolds, Gina Torres Zoe Alleyne Washburne, Alan Tudyk Hoban "Wash" Washburne, Morena Baccarin Inara Serra, Adam Baldwin Jayne Cobb, Jewel Staite Kaywinnet Lee "Kaylee" Frye, Sean Maher Simon Tam, Summer Glau River Tam and more returning cast from the original series.

Disney Plus Release, Firefly Reboot currently titled Firefly Still Flyin and Episode 1 Athenia Title Explained. What happened after the events of the Serenity Movie 2005. Firefly Comics Explained, the Firefly comics continued the story after the events of the Serenity Movie with Mal and Inara together, Zoe having Wash's Baby Emma, Kaylee and Simon together, River Tam pilot of the Serenity. The crew still on the run from the Alliance, and rogue psychics from the alliance like River Tam with the same powers and abilities. Revealing there were way more people they experimented on.

Several characters return including Chiwetel Ejiofor's The Operative, and we learn more about the backstory of Book's character. And other questions raised during the original Firefly series and later Serenity Movie that were never answered or explored in depth.

Alan Tudyk is returning as Wash, but they have not explained how he is alive again. If the series will take place before the Serenity Movie, or if they will include his character in the new series in some other way. But he will participate in the series.

Marc Guggenheim from Arrow, The Flash, Supergirl, Legends of Tomorrow and the other Arrowverse projects is showrunning with his IRL wife Tara Butters, who did Agent Carter, Joss Whedon's Dollhouse, The Boys Gen V and other shows. 

Joss Whedon is not currently returning, but Nathan Fillion has said he gave his blessing for them to continue Firefly. And they got the legal rights from Fox and Disney to make the series. And are currently figuring out season 1 with an estimated 2028-2029 release date.

I'll do more Firefly Reboot videos as we learn more about the series and get a trailer or teaser of some kind. Nathan Fillion and the rest of the cast will continue talking about it until then too.

Lots more DC and Marvel Trailers coming Supergirl Trailer 2026, Avengers Doomsday Trailer, and Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer videos soon too!

snippet.title: Spielberg’s SECRET UFO Movie Just Dropped… And It’s Terrifying | Disclosure Day Trailer 👽🪐
snippet.description:
Steven Spielberg returns to the genre that changed cinema.
The first trailer for Disclosure Day is here — a mysterious sci-fi thriller about government secrets, alien life, and the moment the truth is revealed to the entire world.

Starring Emily Blunt, Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson and Colman Domingo, the film follows a whistleblower trying to expose a hidden secret that could change humanity forever.
If someone proved to you that we are not alone… would you want the world to know?

From legendary director Steven Spielberg and writer David Koepp, the mind behind Jurassic Park and War of the Worlds, comes one of the most anticipated sci-fi movies of the decade.

🛸 Disclosure Day arrives in theaters June 12, 2026.

Cast:
Emily Blunt
Josh O’Connor
Colin Firth
Eve Hewson
Colman Domingo
Wyatt Russell
🎬 Directed by Steven Spielberg
🎵 Score by John Williams

Tagline: “All Will Be Disclosed.”

snippet.title: THE SUPER MARIO GALAXY MOVIE "Drill Mario & Cloud Luigi" Trailer (NEW 2026)
snippet.description:
Buy Tickets: https://www.thesupermariogalaxymovie.com

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is only in theaters April 1.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of Super Mario Bros., and follows The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which was released in 2023 and earned more than $1.3 billion worldwide. Both the 2023 film and The Super Mario Galaxy Movie are produced by Chris Meledandri of Illumination and Shigeru Miyamoto of Nintendo.
 
The film will be co-financed by Universal Pictures and Nintendo and will be released worldwide by Universal Pictures.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by returning filmmakers Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, from a screenplay by returning screenwriter Matthew Fogel, with Brian Tyler returning to compose the score.

From February 28th to March 15th, the world’s top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

snippet.title: Stephen Wilson Jr. - Gary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to the “Gary” here: https://stephenwilsonjr.ffm.to/gary 

Connect here:
Website: https://www.stephenwilsonjrmusic.com/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StephenWilsonJrMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/stephen.wilson.jr/ 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@stephenwilsonjr 

Lyrics:
Gary these days been lying in his bed made
Working on the same car going on a decade
He scribbles on junk mail, don’t draw attention
I never really noticed but now that I mention it
 
There ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days
Born with a cigarette glued to their face
Fix about anything a hammer can handle
Saving all their money ‘cause a Gary don’t gamble
Ain’t a lot of girls going by Debbie anymore
But they got the same nicotine pouring out their pores
Time leaves town but the minute hand stays
Ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days
 
Gary these days been worried about the bad news
Ain’t a lot of teenagers filling up the church pews
Burning Busch Lights, don’t talk to his brother
Do people even still say grace before supper
 
Hey, there ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days
Born with a cigarette glued to their face
Fix about anything a hammer can handle
Saving all their money ‘cause a Gary don’t gamble
Ain’t a lot of girls going by Debbie anymore
But they got the same nicotine pouring out their pores
Time leaves town but the minute hand stays
Ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days
 
Every now and then gets the damn thing running
Takes it out for a spin first week in May
He believes in God but believes in little
Black eyed peas on the stove on New Years Day
 
I had a weird suspicion with the light out on the front porch
Heart medication poured down where the drain pours
He holds his left arm while his parakeet prays
Has anybody seen much of Gary these days
Has anybody seen much of Gary these days
 
There ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days
There ain’t a lot of boys named Gary these days

#StephenWilsonJr #Gary

Classroom of the Elite Season 4 is coming to Crunchyroll this April! Watch Classroom of the Elite on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-cotepv

ABOUT CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE
Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children.

What's more, every month, the school awards students points with a cash value of 100,000 yen, and the classes employ a laissez-faire policy in which talking, sleeping, and even sabotage are permitted during class.

One month later, Ayanokoji, Horikita, and the students of Class D learn the truth of the system in place within their school...

"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

Lyrics:
Lukas Graham
"7 Years"

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

It was a big big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich so we were out to make that steady figure

Once I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
"Go get yourself a wife or you'll be lonely"
Once I was eleven years old

I always had that dream, like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once I was twenty years old

(Lukas Graham!)

I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once I was twenty years old

Soon we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon we'll be thirty years old

I'm still learning about life
My woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs
And I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me
Some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind
My brother, I'm still sorry

Soon I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life, and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

Once I was seven years old

snippet.title: 𝙄 𝘾𝘼𝙉'𝙏 𝘽𝙀𝙇𝙄𝙀𝙑𝙀 𝙄𝙏𝙎 𝙉𝙊𝙏 𝙎𝙆𝙔𝙍𝙄𝙈
snippet.description:
The Elder Scrolls Skyrim is one of the most successful RPGs and in fact video games of all time! It was so good Todd Howard released it 100 times over and made a lot of money in the process. So yes naturally other game developers have tried to emulate the success and charm of Skyrim. 

So today I The Spiffing Brit decided to play 5 different Scolls Like games that emulate aspects of skyrim whilst bringing something new to the table to see if there are any unheard of hidden gems that can topple the giant of todd howards elder scrolls franchise (Re release machine). 

Chapters: 
00:00 - Intro
02:09 - Tainted Grail
03:15 - Our character awakens!
07:01 - Our first boss encounter
11:00 - The final showdown
12:05 - Tainted Grail Review
12:56 - Gedonia
17:55 - I don’t like the look of those adventurers…
20:27 - Gedonia Review
20:59 - Of Ash & Steel
23:07 - Ambush!
25:43 - Fight for our life!
27:21 - Of Ash & Steel Review
28:00 - Greedfall 2
32:20 - Combat Training
33:43 - The end of the road for Greedfall 2
34:36 - Kingdoms of Amalur Rereckoning
36:46 - Another body on the pile
41:30 - Into the wider world
43:51 - Showered with gifts
45:57 - Kingodms of Amalur Review
46:22 - Outro & Thanks for Watching!

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
